        results.append({'route': f'{method} {path}', 'status': 'ERROR', 'verdict': 'FAIL', 'ts': str(e)})

pass_count = sum(1 for r in results if r['verdict'] == 'PASS')
fail_count = sum(1 for r in results if r['verdict'] == 'FAIL')
print(f"API REGRESSION: {pass_count}/{len(results)} PASS, {fail_count} FAIL")
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))

# Save
with open('/home/user/rork-app/qa-evidence/final-regression.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump({'timestamp': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(), 'results': results, 'pass': pass_count, 'total': len(results)}, f, indent=2)
PYEOF

import requests, json, re, datetime
from datetime import timezone

# Phase 2: Landing page deep audit
url = 'https://ivxholding.com'
r = requests.get(url, timeout=30)
html = r.text

sections = {
    'hero': r'(?i)(hero|id=["\']hero)',
    'featured_properties': r'(?i)(featured|properties|id=["\']properties)',
    'reels': r'(?i)(reels|ivxReels|reel)',
    'how_it_works': r'(?i)(how.it.works|how-it-works)',
    'reviews': r'(?i)(reviews|testimonials)',
    'security': r'(?i)(security|trust|disclosures)',
    'partners': r'(?i)(partners)',
    'registration': r'(?i)(registration|register|join|two-step|waitlist)',
    'footer': r'(?i)(footer|<footer)',
    'navigation': r'(?i)(nav|<nav|navigation)',
    'mobile_menu': r'(?i)(mobile.menu|hamburger|menu-toggle|nav-toggle)',
    'cta_buttons': r'(?i)(get.started|sign.up|join.now|cta|btn-cta)',
}

audit = {}
for name, pattern in sections.items():
    matches = re.findall(pattern, html)
    audit[name] = {'found': len(matches) > 0, 'count': len(matches)}

# Check for issues
issues = []
# Empty sections (look for divs with no content)
empty_sections = re.findall(r'<section[^>]*>\s*</section>', html, re.I)
if empty_sections:
    issues.append(f'{len(empty_sections)} empty <section> tags')

# Horizontal scroll check
overflow_x = len(re.findall(r'overflow-x:\s*hidden', html, re.I))
# Fixed widths > 600px
fixed_widths = re.findall(r'width:\s*(\d{4,})px', html)
large_fixed = [w for w in fixed_widths if int(w) > 600]

# Console.log statements
console_logs = len(re.findall(r'console\.log', html))

# Broken images (src with empty or placeholder)
broken_imgs = re.findall(r'<img[^>]+src=["\']["\']', html, re.I)
img_count = len(re.findall(r'<img', html, re.I))
imgs_with_alt = len(re.findall(r'<img[^>]+alt=["\']', html, re.I))

# Meta tags
title_match = re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', html, re.I|re.S)
description_match = re.search(r'<meta[^>]+name=["\']description["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)
viewport_match = re.search(r'<meta[^>]+name=["\']viewport["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)
canonical_match = re.search(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\']canonical["\'][^>]+href=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)

# Aria labels
aria_labels = len(re.findall(r'aria-label=["\']', html, re.I))

# Scripts loaded
scripts = re.findall(r'<script[^>]+src=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)

# CSS loaded
css_links = re.findall(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\']stylesheet["\'][^>]+href=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)

# Check for IVX colors
gold = len(re.findall(r'#FFD700', html, re.I))
green = len(re.findall(r'#00C48C', html, re.I))
red = len(re.findall(r'#FF4D4D', html, re.I))
blue = len(re.findall(r'#4A90D9', html, re.I))

result = {
    'timestamp': datetime.datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    'url': url,
    'status': r.status_code,
    'size': len(r.content),
    'sections': audit,
    'issues': issues,

sections = {

    'featured_properties': r'(?i)(featured|properties|id=["\']properties)',
    'reels': r'(?i)(reels|ivxReels|reel)',
    'how_it_works': r'(?i)(how.it.works|how-it-works)',
    'reviews': r'(?i)(reviews|testimonials)',
    'security': r'(?i)(security|trust|disclosures)',
    'partners': r'(?i)(partners)',
    'registration': r'(?i)(registration|register|join|two-step|waitlist)',
    'footer': r'(?i)(footer|<footer)',
    'navigation': r'(?i)(nav|<nav|navigation)',
    'mobile_menu': r'(?i)(mobile.menu|hamburger|menu-toggle|nav-toggle)',
    'cta_buttons': r'(?i)(get.started|sign.up|join.now|cta|btn-cta)',
}

audit = {}
for name, pattern in sections.items():
    matches = re.findall(pattern, html)
    audit[name] = {'found': len(matches) > 0, 'count': len(matches)}

# Check for issues
issues = []
# Empty sections (look for divs with no content)
empty_sections = re.findall(r'<section[^>]*>\s*</section>', html, re.I)
if empty_sections:
    issues.append(f'{len(empty_sections)} empty <section> tags')

# Horizontal scroll check
overflow_x = len(re.findall(r'overflow-x:\s*hidden', html, re.I))
# Fixed widths > 600px
fixed_widths = re.findall(r'width:\s*(\d{4,})px', html)
large_fixed = [w for w in fixed_widths if int(w) > 600]

# Console.log statements
console_logs = len(re.findall(r'console\.log', html))

# Broken images (src with empty or placeholder)
broken_imgs = re.findall(r'<img[^>]+src=["\']["\']', html, re.I)
img_count = len(re.findall(r'<img', html, re.I))
imgs_with_alt = len(re.findall(r'<img[^>]+alt=["\']', html, re.I))

# Meta tags
title_match = re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', html, re.I|re.S)
description_match = re.search(r'<meta[^>]+name=["\']description["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)
viewport_match = re.search(r'<meta[^>]+name=["\']viewport["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)
canonical_match = re.search(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\']canonical["\'][^>]+href=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)

# Aria labels
aria_labels = len(re.findall(r'aria-label=["\']', html, re.I))

# Scripts loaded
scripts = re.findall(r'<script[^>]+src=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)

# CSS loaded
css_links = re.findall(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\']stylesheet["\'][^>]+href=["\'](.*?)["\']', html, re.I)

# Check for IVX colors
gold = len(re.findall(r'#FFD700', html, re.I))
green = len(re.findall(r'#00C48C', html, re.I))
red = len(re.findall(r'#FF4D4D', html, re.I))
blue = len(re.findall(r'#4A90D9', html, re.I))

result = {
    'timestamp': datetime.datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),

    'status': r.status_code,

  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - 'expo/ivxholding-landing/**'
      - 'expo/deploy-landing.mjs'
      - 'expo/scripts/landing-*.mjs'
      - 'expo/assets/images/**'
      - '.github/workflows/deploy-landing.yml'
  workflow_dispatch: {}

concurrency:
  group: deploy-landing-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  deploy-landing:
    name: Build + upload landing to S3 + invalidate CloudFront
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
        working-directory: expo
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Install AWS SDK deploy dependencies
        run: bun add @aws-sdk/client-s3 @aws-sdk/client-cloudfront

      - name: Deploy landing page (build + upload + CloudFront invalidation)
        env:
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}
